meta.name: Context Protocols, Authentication & Integration Almanac Roster
meta.research_method: 8-facet wide exploration, 112+ independent searches, 8 parallel agents

tools.name: MCP (Model Context Protocol)
tools.notes: 97M monthly SDK downloads; agent-to-tool communication; Anthropic → AAIF/LF; JSON-RPC over stdio/HTTP

tools.name: A2A (Agent-to-Agent)
tools.notes: 150+ orgs in production; agent-to-agent coordination; Google → Linux Foundation; Agent Cards

tools.name: ACP (Agent Communication Protocol)
tools.notes: ~1,013 (archived); IBM → merged into A2A Aug 2025; REST-native; archived

tools.name: ANP (Agent Network Protocol)
tools.notes: Decentralized agent collaboration; P2P, DID-based identity, JSON-LD; open internet focus

tools.name: UCP (Universal Commerce Protocol)
tools.notes: 20+ retail partners; Google + Shopify; agent-driven commerce; MCP/A2A compatible

tools.name: x402
tools.notes: 150M+ transactions; Coinbase → Linux Foundation; HTTP 402 stablecoin payments; 10+ chains

tools.name: AP2 (Agent Payments Protocol)
tools.notes: Google ecosystem; payment authorization; cryptographically signed mandates; integrates with UCP

tools.name: MPP (Stripe)
tools.notes: Early 2026 launch; Stripe + Tempo; session-based micropayments; fiat + stablecoin

tools.name: AGEX
tools.notes: Academic; agent credential lifecycle; complete protocol spec with AIDs, Delegation Chains, ARP

tools.name: OAN
tools.notes: Academic; trust-governed agent identity; layered stack: Identity, Discovery, Invocation, Governance

tools.name: NANDA
tools.notes: Community; DNS for AI agents; decentralized agent registry; AgentAddr + AgentFacts; ZTAA framework

tools.name: Agora Protocol
tools.notes: Academic; IoA scalable communication; structured routines + natural language interfaces

tools.name: AConP (Cisco)
tools.notes: Drafting; LAN agent invocation; OpenAPI/JSON-based; standard interface for local agents

tools.name: WIMSE (IETF)
tools.notes: Active WG; workload identity; SPIFFE successor; architecture + token formats; RFC expected 2027-2028

tools.name: AIMS (IETF)
tools.notes: Q1 2026; AI agent auth/authz; draft-klrc-aiagent-auth-01; `agent_assertion` grant type

tools.name: SCIM for Agents
tools.notes: Q1 2026; agent lifecycle mgmt; draft-abbey-scim-agent-extension; Agents + AgenticApplications resources

tools.name: Authed
tools.notes: Early access; agent-to-agent auth; unique agent IDs, dynamic tokens, registry; no static credentials

tools.name: Agent Name Service (ANS)
tools.notes: Research; agent identity resolution; PKI-backed directory; maps agent IDs to capabilities/keys/endpoints

tools.name: Vercel AI SDK
tools.notes: Widely adopted; multi-provider AI apps; TypeScript; 20+ providers; React/Next.js hooks; streaming-first

tools.name: OpenAI Agents SDK
tools.notes: 10M+ npm/week; OpenAI-native agents; Python/TypeScript; MCP support; handoffs, guardrails, tracing

tools.name: Anthropic SDK
tools.notes: High; Claude-native apps; extended thinking, prompt caching, computer use tools

tools.name: Smithery
tools.notes: 3,305+ servers; MCP server hosting; free remote hosting; CLI + SDK; verified servers; security breach 2025

tools.name: Glama
tools.notes: 22,000+ servers; MCP discovery + hosting; Firecracker VM isolation; AI chat interface; 3 free servers

tools.name: mcp.so
tools.notes: 17,186+ servers; MCP directory; largest catalog; multi-language; playground; no hosting

tools.name: PulseMCP
tools.notes: 6,970+ servers; MCP news/registry; weekly newsletter; REST API; official registry connection

tools.name: MCPize
tools.notes: 500+ servers; MCP monetization; 80% revenue share; OpenAPI→MCP; affiliate program

tools.name: Portkey
tools.notes: Production; AI observability + routing; 250+ models; MCP Gateway (GA Jan 2026); open source March 2026

tools.name: TrueFoundry
tools.notes: Enterprise; model management at scale; multi-cloud; RBAC, OAuth 2.0, guardrails; 30% cost efficiency

tools.name: ZenMux
tools.notes: Enterprise; multi-LLM access; unified API; intelligent routing; LLM Insurance

tools.name: Google Apigee
tools.notes: GCP-native; zero-code MCP generation; Model Armor; Vertex AI integration; $2,500+/mo

tools.name: Gravitee
tools.notes: Enterprise; unified API/AI governance; Agent Gateway, Agentic IAM, Agent Tool Server, Catalog

tools.name: Cloudflare MCP Gateway
tools.notes: Widely used; MCP reverse proxy; centralized auth, logging, rate-limiting; canonical example

tools.name: HashiCorp Vault
tools.notes: Enterprise standard; secret rotation; dynamic secrets, multi-auth, transit encryption

tools.name: AWS Secrets Manager
tools.notes: AWS-native; secret rotation; automated rotation via Lambda; KMS encryption; costly at scale

tools.name: API Stronghold
tools.notes: Growing; scoped credentials; zero-knowledge; AES-256; automated rotation; team access control

tools.name: Stytch
tools.notes: Production; agent auth; Connected Apps; MCP auth server; consent + token management

tools.name: Scalekit
tools.notes: Production; B2B agent auth; OAuth for AI agents; OBO tokens; delegated auth; audit trails

tools.name: Aembit
tools.notes: Enterprise; MCP authorization; OAuth 2.1, PRMs, workload identity; agent access platform

tools.name: Knostic
tools.notes: Research; MCP security scan; found 100% of 2,000 MCP servers lacked authentication

tools.name: DataDome
tools.notes: Production; MCP protection; real-time intent analysis; tool poisoning detection

tools.name: Invariant Labs
tools.notes: Academic; MCP threat research; demonstrated tool poisoning attacks April 2025

tools.name: Trulioo KYA
tools.notes: Production; agent verification; Digital Agent Passports; Know Your Agent

tools.name: Visa TAP
tools.notes: Early; trusted agents; Trusted Agent Protocol; payment-network level trust

tools.name: ERC-8004 (Trustless Agents)
tools.notes: Mainnet Jan 2026; identity + reputation; on-chain registries for identity, reputation, capability validation

tools.name: OpenClaw
tools.notes: Community; skill marketplace; 1,184 malicious skills found in ClawHub

tools.name: BeeAI (IBM)
tools.notes: 1,013 stars (ACP); multi-agent runtime; formerly ACP-powered; now A2A-based
